---
title: "Two-Arm Fixed Design with Binary endpoints"
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
source("../quarto-setup.R")
```

## Pooled-Variance

```{r}
x_pooled <- read_rds("../outputs/comp_bin_fixed_pooled.rds")
```

```{r}
# datatable(x_pooled$n_ratio)
```

::: {.light-content}
```{r}
#| out-width: 100%
gt_theme_flatly(x_pooled$tables$table_n_ratio)
x_pooled$plots$p_n_ratio + theme_flatly()
```
:::

::: {.dark-content}
```{r}
#| out-width: 100%
gt_theme_darkly(x_pooled$tables$table_n_ratio) 
x_pooled$plots$p_n_ratio + theme_darkly()
```
:::

## Exact 
```{r}
# eval: false
# x_exact <- read_rds("../outputs/comp_bin_fixed_exact.rds") # not loaded currently
```

```{r}
#| eval: false
# datatable(x_exact$n_ratio)
```

```{r}
#| eval: false
# x_exact$tables$table_n_ratio
```

```{r}
#| eval: false
# x_exact$plots$p_n_ratio
```
